	- vault = vaultHub.ensureVault(msg.sender) (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#210)
	- require(bool,string)(IERC20Like(stable).transferFrom(msg.sender,treas,payAmt),transferFrom failed) (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#240)
	- vfide.mintPresale(vault,vfideOut + buyerBonus) (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#243)
	- refVault = vaultHub.ensureVault(referrer) (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#248)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- purchasedByVault[vault] -= refBonus (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#254)
	VFIDEPresale.purchasedByVault (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#118) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- VFIDEPresale.buy(address,uint8,uint256,address) (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#203-261)
	- VFIDEPresale.purchasedByVault (contracts-prod/VFIDEPresale.sol#118)
